phase3_findings.description: file-arm comparand can be absent when the event log is unestablished (split-anchor writability); fail-closed only covered the auditor OID
header comment miscounts behavioral-fix pins (seven, actually eight)

fix_decisions.claim_text: residual write->dispatch-hash window: the write-time digest is captured by re-hashing the on-disk file at dispatch, so a concurrent overwrite in the tiny write->dispatch window is recorded into the log and matches the auditor read
fix_decisions.evidence: below-threshold Suggestion; full close requires hashing in-memory bytes at write time, which an LLM orchestrator cannot reliably compute (no by-hand SHA-1). Dominant race is closed; residual window is millisecond-scale and needs a concurrent same-slug session. Raised by Step 3.5 gate + code-reviewer (both below-threshold).

fix_decisions.claim_text: line ~463 narrative still says the auditor 'sees only the rendered draft' — predates the file-arm mechanism
fix_decisions.evidence: conceptually still true (auditor sees only draft content via file or embed, never drafting context); authoritative §11 item 5 is fully updated. Optional prose refresh, not a contradiction. Raised by final-pass reviewer (Suggestion).

fix_decisions.claim_text: 'one offer per pause' double-ask termination invariant unpinned
fix_decisions.evidence: pr-test-analyzer Gap 3, severity 3 (annoyance not corruption); both offer surfaces are individually pinned. Low blast radius; parked.

skipped_checks.reason: working tree dirty (grades committed HEAD); arms in CI
